<?php namespace Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Basic; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\CredentialsInterface; class BasicQueryHandler extends AbstractHandler { public function __invoke(RequestInterface $request, CredentialsInterface $credentials): RequestInterface { $credentials = $this->extract(Basic::class, $credentials); parse_str($request->getUri()->getQuery(), $query); $query = array_merge($query, $credentials->asArray()); return $request->withUri($request->getUri()->withQuery(http_build_query($query))); } }
